result.result:
# This week on agent-office (Apr 13â€“18)

64 commits on `main`, ~252 files touched. The whole repo was essentially built this week â€” `bd59458` ("Phase 1 Foundation") on Apr 13 is the root commit.

## Shipped by theme

**Foundation & agent core (Apr 13)** â€” `bd59458` Phase 1, `6a1ede2` Phase 2 (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), `ca066d7` Phase 3 memory engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer), `eaebe7c` Phase 4 Office UI with React + animated scene, `69510ec` pixel-art character sprites.

**Pixel office engine extraction (Apr 14)** â€” Broke pixel-agents into modular engine: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), floor/wall tiles (`00cdc7b`), layout modules (`9df83eb`), core engine (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`). Wired into a React `OfficeCanvas` (`c8c8f57`, `6ac04c0`), 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`), default 25Ă—20 layout with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`).

**Launch flow (Apr 14)** â€” claude-mem read-only SQLite adapter (`d109f26`), persona-to-observation filter (`e079b4f`), `preview()` method and claude-mem context injection (`1c875a4`), iTerm2 tab spawning (`64ed75e`), `GET /api/office/preview` + full `launch()` on POST (`acdddfa`), `LaunchPreview` component (`27cb1d3`), picker opens preview instead of launching (`c0f0d86`). Phase 4.6 merged via `6b61356`.

**Telemetry (Apr 15)** â€” Phase 5 telemetry dashboard (`2534692`, merge `3199451`), provider adapters + portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), provider-aware launch preview (`42aab52`), local skill roots + launch inventory (`a4cb528`), UTC-anchored today window (`c1a2dc7`).

**Provider-neutral history (Apr 16)** â€” `9c4afb4` provider-neutral project history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` doctor command, live-session presence stabilization (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`), Codex history summary enrichment (`fc03de3`), local port resolution (`ef1cec2`), licensing/provenance docs (`1e39b01`).

**Unified memory + brief (Apr 18)** â€” The week's headline work. Persona-scoped memory brief generator (`4d9a58a`), bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings (`40c5014`), Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (`01f2a70`), simplified office floor to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer (`d5da889`), brief wired into live launch (`17bf243`), brief rendered in `LaunchPreview` (`ec56fb9`), unified memory stats + semantic search, **claude-mem fallback dropped** (`2dbef00`), picker shows persona memory stats + semantic search (`3c1cf94`), and the UI consolidated into a single 4-step `LaunchWizard` modal (`3b6c0b4`). README rewritten around unified-memory USP (`18e1cbb`), `sqlite-vec` + `@huggingface/transformers` + Playwright added (`0c3dfbd`).

**Untracked, not yet committed** â€” `bench/` and `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` (the whitepaper benchmark suite from S292/3761â€“3765; a smoke test of 9 runs Ă— 1 repeat completed in 409s per 3765).

## Key decisions
- Dropped the claude-mem fallback in favor of the unified memory store (`2dbef00`).
- Consolidated launch UI from multiple screens into one 4-step wizard (`3b6c0b4`).
- Office floor simplified from 7 themed zones down to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer (`d5da889` vs `a4ef81e`).

## Caveats
- I'm reporting what's on `main` â€” I haven't verified branch/remote state beyond `git log`.
- The whitepaper bench work is **local and untracked**; per memory 3762/3764 the runs themselves are incomplete (missing conditions/repeats).
- I did not inspect diffs line-by-line, so commit messages are taken at face value.

tool_input.command: git log --since="2026-04-12" --pretty=format:"%h" | wc -l && git diff --shortstat $(git log --since="2026-04-12" --pretty=format:"%h" | tail -1)~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null
